description:
This quiz tests your grasp of SQL query fundamentals, targeting developers who may have become reliant on ORMs. It is beginner-friendly with a playful, encouraging tone that reassures learners it's common to need a refresher. The quiz covers core SQL concepts like SELECT, JOINs, and filtering.
Topics: SQL queries, SELECT statements, JOINs, filtering, aggregation
Audience: Developers who use ORMs and want to strengthen their raw SQL skills
